import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let raw = io.read_to_end()
  let trimmed = string.trim(raw)
  let n = string.parse_int(trimmed).ok_or("invalid input")?
  mut x = n
  mut sum = 0
  if x == 0
    sum = 0
  else
    while x > 0
      sum = sum + (x % 10)
      x = x / 10
    end
  end
  print("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
